ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications of the patient */,
  "social_history" TEXT /* Social history of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "specific_gravity" REAL /* Specific gravity of the patient's urine */,
  "albumin" INTEGER /* Albumin level in the patient's urine */,
  "sugar" INTEGER /* Sugar level in the patient's urine */,
  "red_blood_cells" TEXT /* Red blood cell status in the patient's urine */,
  "pus_cell" TEXT /* Pus cell status in the patient's urine */,
  "pus_cell_clumps" TEXT /* Pus cell clumps status in the patient's urine */,
  "bacteria" TEXT /* Bacteria status in the patient's urine */,
  "blood_glucose_random" INTEGER /* Random blood glucose level */,
  "blood_urea" INTEGER /* Blood urea level */,
  "serum_creatinine" REAL /* Serum creatinine level */,
  "sodium" INTEGER /* Sodium level in the blood */,
  "potassium" REAL /* Potassium level in the blood */,
  "hemoglobin" REAL /* Hemoglobin level */,
  "packed_cell_volume" INTEGER /* Packed cell volume */,
  "white_blood_cell_count" INTEGER /* White blood cell count */,
  "red_blood_cell_count" REAL /* Red blood cell count */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of lab test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical observation */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the observation was made */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date the observation was recorded */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of clinical observation (e.g., red blood cells, pus cells) */,
  "observation_value" TEXT /* Value of the clinical observation */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clinical observation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clinical observation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_observations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was recorded */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Code of the diagnosis (e.g., ICD-10 code) */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the treatment plan was created */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan was recorded */,
  "treatment_code" TEXT /* Code of the treatment (e.g., CPT code) */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the treatment */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed to the patient */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_monitoring" (
  "monitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health monitoring record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the health monitoring was conducted */,
  "monitor_date" TEXT /* Date the health monitoring was recorded */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "body_mass_index" REAL /* Body mass index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate of the patient */,
  "blood_oxygen_saturation" REAL /* Blood oxygen saturation of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health monitoring record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health monitoring record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_monitoring_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_patients" (
  "user_patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-patient relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_patients_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_patients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "medication_type" TEXT /* Type of the medication */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Side effects of the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the allergy */,
  "allergy_name" TEXT /* Name of the allergy */,
  "allergy_type" TEXT /* Type of the allergy */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Reaction to the allergy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allergy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allergy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "patient_medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient taking the medication */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test type */,
  "test_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the lab test type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab test type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab test type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab test */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the lab test result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the lab test result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the lab test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab test result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab test result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES lab_tests ("test_id")
)
